evals.prompt: Can you do an SEO audit on scraperapi.com? We're trying to rank for 'web scraping API' and 'scraping API for python'. Want to know where we stand vs competitors.
evals.expected_output: A full site-wide SEO audit with SERP ranking checks for both keywords, on-page analysis of key pages, competitor gap analysis against the top-ranking domains, and prioritized recommendations.

evals.prompt: Our blog post at https://www.scraperapi.com/blog/python-web-scraping/ used to rank #3 for 'python web scraping tutorial' and now it's dropped to like page 3. Can you figure out what happened?
evals.expected_output: A single-page audit focused on that URL: SERP ranking check for the keyword, on-page analysis of the page itself, scrape of the current top-ranking competitor pages to identify what they have that this page lacks, and specific recommendations.

evals.prompt: I'm building a new SaaS product — proxiesapi.com. Can you do a quick SEO audit and tell me what keywords the site is going after and whether the on-page SEO is in good shape?
evals.expected_output: Infer target keywords from scraping the homepage, run SERP checks, do on-page analysis, and produce a prioritized recommendation list. Since no keywords were provided, the skill should infer them and confirm before proceeding (or proceed and present findings).
